critical_issues.title: Missing host-storage blob RBAC for managed-identity AzureWebJobsStorage
critical_issues.recommendation: Add a host-storage Storage Blob Data Contributor role assignment for the Function App principal at host storage account scope.

suggestions.title: Add staging deployment-validation artifact
suggestions.recommendation: Add a staging parameters artifact to support az deployment group create validation.

suggestions.title: Avoid committing generated ARM JSON
suggestions.recommendation: Remove generated ARM template from source control to avoid drift.
